# A body mixing valid lines with every malformation class the parser
# must skip (counted) without failing the scrape.
# TYPE good_counter counter
good_counter 41
this is not a metric line
bad_no_value
bad_value{label="x"} notanumber
bad_unclosed{label="x" 1
{ }
good_counter 43 1720000000123 extra
good_gauge{a="b"} 2.5
good_counter_with_ts 44 1720000000123
